name: Mastodon
description: Mastodon is a decentralized, open-source social network based on the ActivityPub protocol. The API allows agents to post statuses (toots), browse timelines, interact with posts via boosts and favorites, search content, and manage account information across federated instances.

capabilities.name: post_status
capabilities.description: Publish a new status (toot) with text content, optional media attachments, content warnings, and visibility settings.

capabilities.name: get_timeline
capabilities.description: Fetch the home, local, or federated timeline as a paginated list of statuses.

capabilities.name: get_status
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single status by its ID, including content, author, media attachments, and engagement counts.

capabilities.name: search_content
capabilities.description: Search Mastodon for statuses, accounts, or hashtags matching a query string.

capabilities.name: boost_status
capabilities.description: Reblog (boost) a status to share it with your followers on your profile.

capabilities.name: favorite_status
capabilities.description: Mark a status as a favorite (like) to show appreciation and save it to your favorites list.

capabilities.name: get_account
capabilities.description: Retrieve profile information for the authenticated user or a specified account, including display name, bio, and follower counts.

capabilities.name: get_notifications
capabilities.description: Fetch a paginated list of notifications including mentions, follows, boosts, and favorites.
